title: Dynamic quality scale-back (hysteresis tiers; REQ-016 critical-interlock)

reboot.note: SELECT/PLAN/ANCHOR: S9.10 scope = render/quality/{QualityProfile,QualityController,QualityTier}.ts per execution_plan.md design summary point 12. Zero-assumption: grepped render/ for existing decor/particle/grain DrawItem fields -- none exist (particles live in ParticlePool, never enter DrawList; grain/decor are baked into PaperStylePack.rasterize() bitmap content). The REQ-016 x REQ-163 interlock is already pinned in DrawList.ts's own DrawItem.critical field comment: applyTier may drop only critical:false items. Scoped the tier ladder as a nonCriticalBudget truncation over DrawList, not a re-invented decor/particle classification that doesn't exist in the shipped code.

select.note: PLAN: QualityProfile.ts (tiers ladder + emaAlpha + degrade/upgradeThresholdMs + cooldownTicks + stabilityWindowTicks, DEFAULT_QUALITY_PROFILE), QualityController.ts (createQualityController/currentTier/reportFrameTime pure EMA state machine, render-layer-only state exactly like CameraState per dm-0004/dm-0082), QualityTier.ts (applyTier: order-preserving critical-preserving truncation).

plan.note: ANCHOR: render/quality/ depends only on render/scene/DrawList.ts (type-only). No src/ or tools/ dependency. RenderIsolation.test.ts already scans render/quality/ for browser globals/wall-clock/Math.random with no changes needed.

anchor.note: IMPLEMENT complete: render/quality/{QualityProfile,QualityController,QualityTier}.ts built. 12 new tests in QualityController.test.ts covering the IRD exit condition: hysteresis gap, cooldown-blocks-oscillation, stability-window-must-be-consecutive, critical-item-interlock, tier-index bounds, purity.

implement.note: VERIFY: npm run build clean; npm test 711/711 green (up from 699). RenderIsolation.test.ts confirms render/quality/ stays scan-clean (no browser globals, no wall-clock, no Math.random, no tools/ import).

verify.note: INTEGRATE: PKG updated in-change (render/quality real node + both dependency directions incl. edges array; hash s9-d1f7a2 -> s9-e4b8c3; pending_nodes now EMPTY -- all eleven P9 render/ subtrees are real nodes); ledger at dm-0107; docs/task_slices.md flips S9.10 COMPLETED.

integrate.note: REPORT: S9.10 -> COMPLETED. REQ-163 gains its S9.10 quality-controller share (P9's synthetic-load-verified IRD exit condition met); REQ-016 gains its critical-interlock-under-quality-scaling share. Both stay IN_PROGRESS until S9.11's phase-level flip (REQ-163 also has a P11 zero-allocation-audit remainder per the plan's VERIFIED schedule; REQ-016 applies further to authored content at P10).
